message:
🐛 Remove inner RefreshButton from all 67 card components

CardWrapper already provides a refresh button in the title bar via
onRefresh prop, making the inner RefreshButton (from RefreshIndicator)
redundant. This removes all inner RefreshButton imports, JSX usage,
and cleans up unused variables (isRefreshing, refetch, handleRefresh,
setIsRefreshing, etc.) that were only used by the removed buttons.

Verified across all 12 pages via CDP audit: every card now has exactly
one refresh button (in the CardWrapper title bar). TypeScript compiles
with 0 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
